summary: imgcache is a Rust thumbnail caching proxy: an actix-web HTTP service storing thumbnails in a bounded in-memory map keyed by SHA-256 content hash. The README's claims about a Django admin dashboard, a React widget, and a frontend/ directory are stale — no such files exist in the tree; the repo is Rust-only and tests run with cargo.

entrypoints.description: Binary main; starts the actix-web server on 127.0.0.1:8080 with the /healthz and /thumb routes

key_directories.role: service source: HTTP handlers (handlers.rs) and the bounded in-memory store (cache.rs)
cargo integration tests pinning wire formats
